name: Remo Canessa
bio: Remo Canessa served as Chief Financial Officer of Zscaler until Kevin Rubin succeeded him on May 26, 2025. He is included in the FY2025 proxy as a former officer per SEC rules — his FY2025 SCT total of $957K reflects salary and short-term incentive only, with no new equity grant in his final year as an NEO. Canessa's FY2023 and FY2024 disclosures show the more typical mix of salary, equity, and bonus.

footnotes: No new equity granted in FY2025 — Canessa was succeeded as CFO on May 26, 2025.
All Other Compensation reflects eligible executive benefits paid by the Company and associated tax gross-ups.
Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2024 performance condition. Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion was $6,165,751.
All Other Compensation reflects eligible executive benefits paid by the Company and associated tax gross-ups.
Stock Awards comprise time-based RSUs plus PSUs valued at the probable outcome of the FY2023 performance condition. Per the proxy, the maximum-performance value of his PSU portion was $1,884,419.
